item.title: Frontier Exploration - Sensory Knowledge Capture
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Sensory Knowledge Capture How do you capture knowledge about taste, smell, texture, and other sensory experiences in a knowledge base? The Problem Some knowledge domains are fundamentally sensory: Cooking — taste, texture, aroma, mouthfeel Wine/coffee — flavor profiles, aroma c...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Personal Experience Contradiction
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Personal Experience Contradiction When your personal experience contradicts published sources, how should you capture this in your knowledge base? The Problem You read that a technique, approach, or method is “best” according to sources.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Knowledge Ethics and Exclusion
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Knowledge Ethics and Exclusion When should a knowledge base choose NOT to capture knowledge? What wisdom lies in what we choose not to record? The Problem The Seed has extensive rules about: What to capture (atomicity, sourcing, verification) How to structure (linking, navigati...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Equipment and Tool Dependencies
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Equipment and Tool Dependencies in Knowledge Bases The Gap The Seed covers: Learning prerequisites — what knowledge you need BEFORE learning something new (prerequisites: []) Software version dependencies — which software version knowledge applies to (version:, eol-estimate) B...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Multiple Equivalent Approaches
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Multiple Equivalent Approaches When there are multiple valid ways to achieve the same goal, how should a knowledge base present this? This frontier explores the gap between “contradictory sources” (one is wrong) and “subjective preferences” (all are valid).

item.title: AI Assistance Quality Criteria
item.description: AI Assistance Quality Criteria This note provides an overview of AI-assistance capabilities for knowledge base quality evaluation.

item.title: AI-Assisted Connection Suggestion
item.description: AI-Assisted Connection Suggestion AI can suggest meaningful connections between notes that humans might miss.

item.title: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed Drop this file into any vault to bootstrap a healthy, self-improving knowledge base.

item.title: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management How AI enhances each stage of the knowledge management pipeline.

item.title: AI-Assisted Link Quality Evaluation
item.description: AI-Assisted Link Quality Evaluation AI can automatically evaluate link quality in a knowledge base.
